test case id: tc-reports-001 title: retrieve list of reports module: reports source pages: 3, 6 preconditions: a report exists in the database. test data: - no specific data required. test steps: 1. application calls getsegnalazioni(). 2. sistema di gestione segnalazioni forwards the request to sistema di gestione dei dati. 3. sistema di gestione dei dati queries the database. 4. database returns the payload. 5. sistema di gestione dei dati returns the payload to sistema di gestione segnalazioni. 6. sistema di gestione segnalazioni returns the payload to application. 7. application checks if the list is null and displays accordingly. expected result: list of reports is displayed correctly.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-trains-001 title: retrieve list of trains module: trains source pages: 7, 8 preconditions: a train list exists. test data: - no specific data required. test steps: 1. application requests the train list. 2. sistema gestione calendario forwards the request to sistema di gestione dei dati. 3. sistema di gestione dei dati requests trains from api trenitalia. 4. api trenitalia queries the database. 5. database returns the payload. 6. api trenitalia forwards the payload to sistema di gestione dei dati. 7. sistema di gestione dei dati forwards the payload to sistema gestione calendario. 8. sistema gestione calendario forwards the payload to application. 9. application checks if the list is null and displays accordingly. expected result: train list is displayed correctly.

test case id: tc-variations-001 title: retrieve train variations module: variations source pages: 9 preconditions: train variations exist. test data: - no specific data required. test steps: 1. application requests train variations. 2. sistema gestione variazioni retrieves the variations. 3. sistema gestione variazioni returns the variations to the application. 4. application sends the variations to the notification system. expected result: train variations are displayed correctly.
